{{Infobox group
| name = Heaven’s Glory School
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Heaven’s Glory School Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Located on [[Mount Samara]], the Heaven’s Glory School is a prestigious institution known for its [[sacred arts]] and high reputation. The school's architecture is characterized by glistening rainstone buildings that appear perpetually wet, often featuring integrated gardens and specialized training areas. Disciples are identified by their white and gold attire, which includes red sashes, and iron neck badges. The school maintains strict standards for its members, including regulations regarding interpersonal violence and specific clothing requirements that denote rank. Prospective students must undergo the [[Trial of Glorious Ascension]], a test involving a staircase with [[Remnant]] formations; those who complete it quickly may earn rewards from the [[Lesser Treasure Hall]], which houses various weapons, elixirs, and constructs. The school is also home to the [[Jades]], a group of powerful members, and utilizes specialized techniques such as Heaven’s Wish to transfer power and skill between individuals. While the school is a symbol of honor and majesty, it has faced significant challenges, including abductions of its disciples by outsiders and physical destruction that required extensive repairs. The institution's influence is tied closely to its reputation, as its standing affects its relationships with various clans and nomadic groups.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Located on [[Mount Samara]], the Heaven’s Glory School is a riverstone-sculpted institution that uses [[Samara]]’s ring to gather [[light aura]]. The school maintains a hierarchy of elders and lesser initiates, rarely accepting students below the [[Iron stage]] and forbidding disciples from killing one another. While members are permitted to compete for everything, the elders prioritize strength and only intervene if a disciple dies. Disciples typically wear white and gold uniforms with red sashes and iron badges, though the school has recently suffered the abduction of four members by an outsider seeking their [[sacred arts]]. During [[Lindon]]'s attempt to trick his way into the school, he encountered an elder in combat and dealt with a faction that had previously taken [[Yerin's master]]'s body, [[sword]], and [[Remnant]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Heaven’s Glory School]] is a school that some refiners have gone on pilgrimage to.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4">''Unsouled'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Heaven’s Glory School]] has lost four disciples to abduction by an outsider seeking their [[sacred arts]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Heaven's Glory]] School is represented by a boy wrapped in white and gold.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9">''Unsouled'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Heaven's Glory]] School of [[Mount Samara]] wears white and gold and its members wear iron badges.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Heaven’s Glory School]] has claimed [[Mount Samara]] and uses [[Samara]]’s ring to gather [[light aura]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Heaven's Glory]] School has disciples who wear white and gold uniforms with a red sash.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c13">''Unsouled'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Heaven's Glory]] School has a hierarchy including lesser initiates and elders.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Heaven’s Glory School]] buildings are sculpted from riverstone.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Heaven’s Glory School]] rarely accepts anyone below the [[Iron stage]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Heaven's Glory]] School forbids its disciples from killing one another.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15">''Unsouled'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Disciples in the [[Heaven's Glory]] School are allowed to compete against each other for everything.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The elders of the [[Heaven's Glory]] School only want the strongest disciples and do not care as long as nobody dies.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Heaven's Glory]] School has various halls and elders.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16">''Unsouled'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Heaven's Glory]] School is a school that [[Lindon]] has been tricking his way into.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Heaven's Glory]] School took [[Yerin's master]]'s body, [[sword]], and [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Heaven's Glory]] School has an elder that [[Lindon]] fought.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17" />}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Heaven’s Glory School]] is a school from which [[Lindon]] stole a [[parasite ring]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] once stood against the entire [[Heaven's Glory]] School.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] engaged in battle with the [[Heaven’s Glory School]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jades]] of the [[Heaven's Glory]] School did something to [[Yerin's master]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Heaven's Glory]] School has treasures.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12">''Skysworn'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Heaven's Glory]] School sent a sacred beast to hunt [[Kelsa]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Heaven's Glory]] School came to the [[Wei clan]] looking for a girl they called the disciple of the [[Sword Sage]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c1">''Uncrowned'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Heaven's Glory]] School contains [[Jades]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c1" />}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Heaven’s Glory School]] is described as a collection of backwards savages who have forgotten nearly everything about the [[sacred arts]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Heaven's Glory]] School is located near the [[Ancestor's Tomb]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Heaven’s Glory School]] is located in [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Located near the eastern exit of [[Sacred Valley]], the Heaven’s Glory School is an institution composed of smooth rainstone buildings that covers a large portion of the mountain. This group, which once held a coveted position for [[Amon]], is known for gathering [[Ruler techniques]] and maintaining apprentices identified by wooden, iron, or copper badges. Although the school is willing to negotiate regarding territory, it has previously hunted [[Lindon]]'s family and possesses more influence than the [[Wei clan]]. Despite being described as the most wisdom-challenged of the schools, they surrounded a hill with plans to keep [[Kazan]] prisoners until their formation was deactivated. Following these events, [[Lindon]] claimed the school in the absence of its [[Jades]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] has no attachment to the [[Heaven’s Glory School]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The group is moving toward the [[Heaven’s Glory School]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven’s Glory School]] consists of smooth rainstone buildings.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven’s Glory School]] has apprentices with copper, iron, or wooden badges.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven’s Glory School]] is a school that is willing to negotiate regarding territory.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven’s Glory School]] covers a large portion of the mountain.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven’s Glory School]] was gathering [[Ruler techniques]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven’s Glory School]] hunted down [[Lindon]]'s family.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8">''Bloodline'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven's Glory]] School is a group [[Lindon]] could fight.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven’s Glory School]] is more powerful and influential than the [[Wei clan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven’s Glory School]] is described as the most wisdom-challenged of the schools.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven’s Glory School]] is located near the eastern exit from [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The fleet of clouds landed in the [[Heaven’s Glory School]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven's Glory]] School is a school that [[Amon]] once held a coveted position in.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Heaven’s Glory School]] is a group/institution.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven's Glory]] School has surrounded the hill.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven’s Glory School]] planned to keep the [[Kazan]] prisoners.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] intends to plow through the Heaven�s Glory School.}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven's Glory]] School deactivated their formation.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] claims [[Heaven's Glory]] School in the absence of its [[Jades]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15" />}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Heaven’s Glory School]] is a former site.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“The honorable Heaven’s Glory School has lost no less than four disciples to abduction, it seems.”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“I’m just a lesser initiate. You would need to speak to an elder…”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c13" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|“If Lindon returned today and saw what I’ve seen, he would leave every Jade in the Heaven’s Glory School as a pile of ashes.”<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c1" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|"If I had to bet on a fight between Lindon and the whole Heaven’s Glory School, I’d put all my money on Lindon."<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
